summary: Bug Fix Verified: GET /api/parcelas/{id}/historial-tratamientos endpoint now working. The 'ERROR AL CARGAR TRATAMIENTOS' issue is resolved. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend modal displays treatment history correctly with estadisticas and treatment table.

issues: Console hydration warnings about <span> inside <select>/<option>/<tr>/<td> - cosmetic issue from preview environment instrumentation, not functional

critical_code_review_comments: The endpoint implementation in routes_parcelas.py is well-structured with proper error handling (400 for invalid ObjectId, 404 for non-existent parcela)
The query uses $or to match parcela_id in multiple formats which is good for data compatibility
Field mapping from tratamientos collection to frontend expected fields is handled correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (modal opens, displays data correctly, no errors)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The historial-tratamientos endpoint is fully functional. Parcela 69a80e2548998a33fe591667 has 3 tratamientos with products Score 250 and Foliar Plus. The modal displays estadisticas (total_tratamientos, productos_usados, tipos_aplicados) and a table of treatments.

tests: Returns 200 with historial array and estadisticas object for valid parcela
Response structure includes total_tratamientos, productos_usados, tipos_aplicados

verified_elements: Modal opens when clicking Historial button (data-testid='btn-historial-{id}')
Parcela info section (Proveedor, Cultivo, Superficie, Campaña)
Estadisticas cards (Tratamientos Totales: 3, Productos Diferentes: 2, Tipos de Tratamiento: 2)
Treatment history table with columns: Fecha, Producto, Tipo, Dosis, Superficie, Aplicador
Productos Utilizados section showing Score 250 and Foliar Plus
frontend_modal.no_error_message: Confirmed - 'ERROR AL CARGAR TRATAMIENTOS' no longer appears

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: ERROR AL CARGAR TRATAMIENTOS when opening Treatment History modal
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - Modal now loads and displays treatment data correctly

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real - no mocking
